backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (landing screen, garden page, flower grid, message display, surprise button, thank-you modal) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components like WelcomeGate, GardenPage, FlowerGrid, HeartCanvas, and various hooks and utility components.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the Shadcn UI design token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'A Garden for Priya' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that toggles between the WelcomeGate landing screen and the GardenPage based on an 'entered' boolean state.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/FlowerGrid.tsx: Renders a 3×2 grid of 6 flower emojis with desaturated/sepia styling for unviewed flowers, full color for viewed ones, and hover scale/color effects on click.
frontend/src/components/GardenPage.tsx: Main garden page component orchestrating the flower grid, message display, surprise button, heart burst animation, and thank-you modal, revealing the surprise button after all 6 flowers are viewed.
Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/HeartBurst.tsx: Spawns 100 heart emoji particles (❤️/💖) at random positions across the viewport using DOM injection and CSS animations, auto-removing each after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/LoveLetterPage.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/MessageDisplay.t: Scrollable 250px message area with double gold borders that displays one of 6 predefined personal messages with a fade-in animation when a flower index is selected.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/SurpriseButton.t: Conditionally rendered pulsing pink button labeled 'For You, Priya ❤️' that appears after all flowers are viewed and triggers the heart burst and modal on click.
frontend/src/components/ThankYouModal.ts: A fixed-position modal component that displays a personal thank-you message with a backdrop overlay; renders nothing when `visible` is false and closes on backdrop click or button press.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeGate.tsx: A full-screen entrance landing component with a radial gradient background, italic subtitle, and an 'Enter' button that triggers a fade-out transition before calling the `onEnter` callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an anonymous actor when unauthenticated or an identity-bound actor when logged in, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file reserved for a background music hook with no current implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file reserved for a heart animation hook with no current implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for React Query backend hooks; currently exports nothing and contains no active queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties (parchment/ink/gold/love theme), Tailwind base layers, custom scrollbar styles, and keyframe animations for fade-in, heart burst particles, surprise button pulse, and accordion transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom parchment/ink/gold/love colors, Georgia serif fonts, CSS-variable-based design tokens, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing the 'A Garden for Priya' romantic single-page app, its architectural notes, existing feature inventory with IDs and requirements, and known issues.
